mapper.select: SELECT * FROM guestbook WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM guestbook WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM guestbook ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guestbook (content, author_name, author_email, author_avatar, reply, reply_time, status, sort, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{content}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorAvatar}, #{reply}, #{replyTime}, #{status}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE guestbook SET content = #{content}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_avatar = #{authorAvatar}, reply = #{reply}, reply_time = #{replyTime}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE guestbook SET reply = #{reply}, reply_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guestbook WHERE status = 1
